step1.title: Create a free account
step1.body: Go to <link>enablebanking.com</link> and register. Confirm your email address.

step2.title: Create an application
step2.body: Click <app>Applications</app> and then <newapp>New application</newapp>. Fill in:

step3.title: Link your accounts
step3.body: Link the accounts you want to sync with Lommin.

step4.title: Download the key file
step4.body: Click <register>Register</register> — a <pem>.pem</pem> file will be downloaded. Keep it safe, it cannot be downloaded again.

spiirImport.description: Import historical transactions from Spiir. Choose CSV export for simple import, or ZIP export (full data export) for better data with account names, bank and categories from Spiir. Duplicates are skipped.
spiirImport.noAccounts: No accounts found in the file. Check that the file is a valid Spiir export.
spiirImport.noAccountsZip: No accounts found in the ZIP file. Check that the file is a valid Spiir data export.

csvImport.description: Import transactions from your own CSV file with the following columns:

pemSafety.label: Is this safe?
pemSafety.storedLocally: Your key never leaves your browser
pemSafety.storedLocallyBody: The .pem file is imported as a non-extractable CryptoKey in your browser's IndexedDB. Once imported, the raw key bytes cannot be read back by JavaScript or sent anywhere.
pemSafety.openSourceBody: The source code is open. You can review it, fork it, or build and deploy your own instance.
pemSafety.networkTabBody: Open DevTools → Network to see exactly what leaves your browser. The signing key is never transmitted — only short-lived signed JWTs (5-minute validity) that are sent to the proxy and then to Enable Banking.
pemSafety.ownProxyBody: The CORS proxy only sees already-signed requests — it never has access to your key. You can run your own proxy for full control.
pemSafety.testFirst: Try it without linking accounts first
pemSafety.testFirstBody: Import a .pem key from a new Enable Banking app that has no bank accounts linked yet. Explore the interface and link your accounts later when you're ready.

errorBoundary.title: Something went wrong
errorBoundary.body: An unexpected error occurred. Your data is safe locally — try again, or reload the page.
